english_core_training.reason: three real development cores were trained, but every open-ended sample showed severe four-gram repetition

foundation_training_efficiency.reason: LayerCake trained faster in raw wall time but never reached the transformer's locked final English quality

gpu_runtime.reason: fp16 SDPA transformer with a per-layer KV cache ran on the RTX 3080 Laptop GPU

installation_losslessness.reason: installation used no receiver data/calibration, changed no core or cake values, and preserved archive bytes

matched_quality_comparison.reason: no LayerCake and transformer pair met the same locked general and ordinary-domain task thresholds

mobile_export.reason: TorchScript portable-fusion export reloads with exact logits

multi_seed_replication.reason: three core seeds ran without failed seeds, but the cake and transformer comparisons each have only one training seed and no confidence interval

orchestration.reason: signed install, learned routing, CPU generation, removal, disappearance, reinstall, and three-host execution ran end to end

package_security.reason: the complete suite includes adversarial archive, traversal, duplicate, signature, and safetensors checks

payload_identity.reason: archive bytes and tensor payload remained identical

physical_mobile_execution.reason: no physical mobile device was available

random_cake_control.reason: trained cake beats the frozen random control on held-out code BPB

real_cross_host_portability.reason: three actual hosts retained every locked BPB improvement, but the source cake had no ordinary task successes to port

repository_regression.reason: complete pytest run is green and tied to the exact source tree

routing_accuracy.reason: learned hidden-suite routing met every locked target

same_scale_quality.reason: the matched-scale transformer has materially lower held-out English BPB

sparse_physical_execution.reason: top-1 execution and sparse optimizer residency are implemented, but inactive-weight cache residency and memory traffic were not established by native profiling

stateful_decoding_correctness.reason: exact full-context equivalence and sustained 1,024-byte stateful decoding were measured

uninstall_reinstall.reason: removal restored core fallback and reinstall reverified identical bytes

unrelated_capability_retention.reason: the Python cake caused a meaningful unrelated-English BPB regression

wrong_domain_control.reason: no second serious V2 cake was trained after the first cake failed its ordinary-task gate

single_next_experiment: Keep the frozen V2 ABI, scale the English core until it matches the transformer, then retrain the Python cake and require nonzero held-out unit-test/syntax success before any more domains or performance claims.
